name: fit4110_lab03_postman_mock_testing
description: FIT4110 Lab 03 — Consumer-Driven Contract Testing với Postman, Newman và Prism.

scripts.mock:all: npm run mock:iot & npm run mock:analytics & wait
scripts.test:mock: npx newman run postman/collections/team-analytics.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/team-analytics_mock.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-report.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint:contracts && npm run test:mock

author: FIT4110
